pixel.note: Four INDEPENDENT counters, not one funnel population. blended across worldfirst.com global + China site + customer portal + Zyla, and ~55% of these events are fired server-side by the WF backend (so China is partially included via that feed; the browser half is China-blind). NOT v2-attributed, completes lag approval by days (which is why completes can exceed submits). Plumbing pulse only. Campaign performance = the attributed scorecard above. China vs rest-of-world = WF backend BI, never this pixel.
